72733.title: Ringfinger
72733.description: A couple must decide the future of their relationship, regardless of what it may require.

72734.title: Coulrophobia
72734.description: After a tragic event in his past takes both his parents, Luke is left with a lifelong fear of clowns. Years later, he meets a beautiful woman at a party that he finally connects with, but she has a secret that may complicate things.

72736.title: Night Of The Fluffet
72736.description: When a little girl finds an abandoned Fluffet out in the woods, she has no idea of the ropey-limbed chaos she is about to bring down upon her loved ones.

72737.title: On My Way To Hell
72737.description: After purchasing a mysterious box from his dealer, Cory and his girlfriend Annie are ready for the high of their lives.

72738.title: Lion
72738.description: An isolated chalet in a snowy forest, a man blinded by alcohol, a woman unable to rebel, and an eight-year-old child troubled and dark. The silent night is broken with cries: the start of a terrible nightmare.

72739.title: Filmmaker Spotlight - James Bort
72739.description: Different filmmakers come to the show to give their take on the filming process.

72742.title: Samoeraai
72742.description: The young Ivan lives with his eccentric single mother in Rotterdam. When he receives a samurai sword one day, all his hopes and dreams become reality.

72743.title: The Man Who Killed James Bond
72743.description: Fabrizio is a petty thief from St. Basil, a seedy suburb in Rome. He is finally facing the man who ruined his life, James Bond. The fascinating British spy was an idol for Fabrizio, who didn't miss any of his countless action movies.

72768.title: Love
72768.description: Bringing you the latest and best in programming entertainment.

72769.title: Hold On
72769.description: Window cleaner Dennis falls from the 40th floor of a high rise and gets stuck outside the window of Debbie, who is getting ready for a date. The two have an awkward conversation through the soundproof glass.

72770.title: The Roll Of A Roll
72770.description: Following the stop motion adventures of a roll of camera film.

72771.title: The Fear Inside
72771.description: An agoraphobic woman encounters unexplained events in her home and wrestles with whether her need to escape them outweighs her paralyzing fear.

72772.title: Don't Let It Out
72772.description: A young woman is trapped in an abusive relationship and her only escape is through a demonic force.

72773.title: L'oiseau Bleu
72773.description: Colourful characters spend an unforgettable evening at L'Oiseau Bleu, a famous seaside restaurant located in Tunis. While enjoying fish, couscous, music and drinks, get to know Imen, Moudir, Ferid, Tarek and Sabre.

72774.title: Best Before End
72774.description: Francois, 65-years-old, lives alone in his flat. He has no one to talk to. One morning he's sitting on his armchair facing his window. He remains still but his inner voice is giving us his mood.

72775.title: Punta Cana
72775.description: As we get older we become wiser but also weaker, and it is then that we have to face reality.

72776.title: Rocky
72776.description: Pablito is desperate to raise money for his brother's emergency treatment, and so takes his fighting cockerel Rocky to town to take on Ajiseco, the roughest rooster in the region. He hopes fate will be on his side this time.

72777.title: Carousel
72777.description: A man escapes death and returns to the small town he grew up in. Forced to face the consequences of what he left behind, he attempts to make things right before fate catches up with him.

72779.title: Best Before End
72779.description: Francois, 65-years-old, lives alone in his flat. He has no one to talk to. One morning he's sitting on his armchair facing his window. He remains still but his inner voice is giving us his mood.

72781.title: To Garbo And Lenin
72781.description: Greta Garbo and Vladimir Lenin meet at a department store in Stockholm in 1917. They start a conversation that lasts all day while they walk through the city.

72782.title: Sometimes, I Think About Dying
72782.description: Fran likes to think about dying. When she makes a guy in the office laugh, he wants more: a movie date, a slice of pie, a conversation. But if dating him means learning to live, Fran is pretty sure she can't do that.

72783.title: Love Bite-easy Way Out
72783.description: Short films selected from an array of film festivals from all around the world.

72785.description: The young Ivan lives with his eccentric single mother in Rotterdam. When he receives a samurai sword one day, all his hopes and dreams become reality.

72787.title: Belgian Stories-follow Me
72787.description: Belgian Stories is a series of short films made in Belgium about the small country.
